Comfortable Accommodations: Alaqur View Inn in Nizwa offers family rooms with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and modern amenities. Each room includes a dining area, TV, and free WiFi.
Dining and Leisure: Guests can enjoy a sun terrace, restaurant, and outdoor seating area. The property provides free WiFi, a barbecue facility, and bicycle parking.
Convenient Location: Located 146 km from Muscat International Airport, the guest house is a 4-minute walk from Nizwa Fort. Nearby attractions include Nizwa Souq and Ibri Road.
Guest Services: The inn offers a paid shuttle service, room service, and breakfast in the room with vegetarian and halal options. Free off-site parking is available.

hotels.description_en:
Spacious Accommodation: Bostan Al-Mostadhill Chalet in Nizwa offers a spacious homestay with three bedrooms and four bathrooms. The property includes a living room and family rooms, ensuring comfort for all guests.
Outdoor Amenities: Guests can relax in the year-round outdoor swimming pool with a view or unwind in the hot tub. The property features a lush garden and an outdoor seating area, perfect for leisure.
Modern Facilities: The homestay provides free WiFi, air-conditioning, and a fully equipped kitchen with a refrigerator, microwave, and oven. Additional amenities include a dining table, sofa bed, and free toiletries.
Convenient Location: Located 147 km from Muscat International Airport, the homestay is a 13-minute walk from Nizwa Fort.
